prompt: State fake/sample-only purpose, no real intake, no official Toastmasters process, and no live Decidim approval.

prompt: Ask each facilitator to confirm all records are fake, minimised, and safe for public demo.

prompt: Run mentor interest, program priority proposal, event poll, and resource suggestion.

prompt: Confirm officer election, member record, education, and payment workflows remain outside Decidim.
